title: hypericum orientale var. ptarmicifolium
intro: Hypericum orientale var. ptarmicifolium, also known as St. John's Wort 'Ptarmica', is a perennial plant that belongs to the St. John's Wort family (Hypericaceae) and is native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, which have been used to treat wounds, reduce pain, and promote skin healing. The health benefits of Hypericum orientale var. ptarmicifolium include its ability to reduce anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The plant is commonly prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in topical creams and ointments to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
